title: Rename sweep — .claude/ domain commands
description: Fix the stale Fabric artifact names in the project's domain slash-command definitions (sync/run/review/validate). Mostly mechanical path/name updates. Part of the task-021 sweep (audit C-01).
acceptanceCriteria: Semantic-model refs updated to OEMInsightBI_v2: sync-from-fabric.md (~L66/L97), sync-to-fabric.md (~L46/L110), run-full-pipeline.md (~L108).
Cleaning-notebook refs updated to bronze-to-silver.Notebook: run-silver.md (~L7/L37/L49/L166), review-transformations.md (~L21/L25/L379), validate-schema.md (~L389).

Each updated reference points at an artifact that exists on disk; confirm none of the touched lines is a historical 'old name archived' note (these command files are operational instructions, so all occurrences are expected to be active — but verify).
These are domain (project-owned) commands, not template-owned — editing them is in scope.
notes: Full context: parent task-021 + audit C-01.
DISK TRUTH: fabric/OEMInsightBI_v2.SemanticModel/, fabric/bronze-to-silver.Notebook/, fabric/report2.Report/ are canonical; old names live ONLY under fabric/archive/.
Lowest-judgment group — operational command instructions, occurrences are active. Still grep each file for report.Report too, in case any command references the report artifact.

--- IMPLEMENTED 2026-06-21 (orchestrator; .claude/ sandbox prevents subagent writes) --- Swept renames across 6 domain command files (sync-from/sync-to/run-full-pipeline/run-silver/review-transformations/validate-schema). JUDGMENT: sync commands referenced .../definition/measures.tmdl which does NOT exist in the v2 model (measures reorganized to per-table .tmdl under definition/tables/); re-pathed the leaf to definition/tables/ to satisfy AC#3 (paths exist on disk) rather than leaving a broken path. Post-edit grep: 0 residual old tokens; new paths (definition/tables/, fact_procurement.tmdl, bronze-to-silver.Notebook/notebook-content.py) verified on disk.

task_verification.notes: PASS attempt 1. 0 residual old tokens across all 6 command files (positive control established for report.Report-vs-report2 discrimination). New names exist on disk.
